hero.title: Pricing
hero.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.description: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts.

comingSoon.title: Pricing Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: We're working on finalizing our pricing structure to ensure it's fair, transparent, and aligned with the value we provide. Our pricing will be designed to make care accessible for everyone.

earlyAccess.title: Interested in Early Access?
earlyAccess.description: Be the first to know when pricing is launched and receive exclusive early-bird offers.

forUsers.title: Tailored for Every User
forUsers.description: Our pricing will be customized for each type of user on our platform
forUsers.guardiansDesc: Affordable plans for families seeking quality care
forUsers.caregiversDesc: Fair commission structures to support your livelihood
forUsers.agenciesDesc: Scalable pricing to grow your operations
forUsers.shopOwnersDesc: Cost-effective plans to reach new customers

contactSales.title: Need a Custom Quote?
contactSales.description: Contact our sales team for enterprise pricing and custom solutions tailored to your organization.
